title: Notion Get Many node ignoring limit parameter
symptom: The Notion 'Get Many Database Page' node returns 100 items instead of the specified limit of 1, despite the configuration settings. This inconsistency occurs in specific executions, causing issues in production.
applies_when: Using Notion 'Get Many Database Page' node
not_this_if: The node is functioning correctly in other executions
root_cause: The Notion node is using a deprecated endpoint that does not respect the limit parameter consistently. This can lead to unexpected results, especially when the endpoint behavior changes or when there are specific conditions in the Notion API response.
fix_steps: Switch to using an HTTP Request node instead of the Notion node
Create the request body with the necessary filters and limit
Test the new setup to ensure it returns the correct number of items
agent_instruction: Use an HTTP Request node to query Notion with the correct filters and limit settings.
